public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as apprentice factor.
manner: Treats exchange as a social instrument as much as an economic one, reading appetite and hesitation alike. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a apprentice factor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of apprentice factor in and around Shelkopolis Public Library, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Shelkopolis Public Library workable through the obligations of apprentice factor while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must keep exchange moving despite scarcity, theft risk, tariffs, and reputational damage. Around Shelkopolis Public Library, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of apprentice factor visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Maren Threadmere can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.
Maren Threadmere will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Maren Threadmere read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Shelkopolis Public Library: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
